title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUGSUK IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5880 / 58 OG No. 25, 4592 (June 18, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3390, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUGSUK IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bugsuk in the Municipality of Balabac, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Bugsuk.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
